utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: Hi . God , it seems like just yesterday you guys used to come out to watch me work .

emotion_cause.span: 4_it seems like just yesterday you guys used to come out to watch me work .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Dad , we ... we can not believe you are selling the house .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: Well , it is time for a new family to start their memories here and hopefully their check will clear before they find the crack in the foundation and the asbestos in the ceiling .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Let grab our stuff and get the hell out of here .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: I am sorry we can not store your childhood things anymore .

emotion_cause.span: 8_we can not store your childhood things anymore .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , that is okay , I can not wait to see everything again ! All of the memories

emotion_cause.span: 9_I can not wait to see everything again ! All of the memories

utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: Well , I do not know what in the boxes down here , but I do know there are six or seven Easy Bake Ovens in the attic .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I used to love to play restaurant .

emotion_cause.span: 11_I used to love to play restaurant .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , not as much as you used to love to play uncooked batter eater .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey , it is unreasonable to expect a child to wait for a light bulb to cook brownies !

emotion_cause.span: 13_it is unreasonable to expect a child to wait for a light bulb to cook brownies !
